expectations.text: Reading time uses Jekyll's built-in number_of_words filter rather than a heavy custom plugin
TOC uses kramdown's native {:toc} — does NOT introduce jekyll-toc or unrelated plugins
expectations.evidence: Lines 50-81: custom HTML parsing include instead of kramdown {:toc}

expectations.text: Restricts the TOC to H2 and H3 (e.g., toc_levels: 2..3 in _config.yml)
Related posts uses a correct tag-overlap algorithm
expectations.evidence: Lines 103-122: nested loop with contains check

expectations.text: Does NOT use the invalid {# … #} Liquid comment syntax
expectations.evidence: Lines 55, 68: uses '{%- comment -%}' but also uses '{%- comment -%}' pattern

expectations.text: States that the code belongs in _layouts/post.html
Either uses tag-overlap manually OR mentions site.related_posts with --lsi cost
